sections.name: role_and_inputs
sections.description: Use at the start to understand the GenAI agent role, accepted model_id/task inputs, and local tiny model identity rules.

sections.name: repo_setup
sections.description: Use only after validation proves a local GenAI source edit is required.

sections.name: validation
sections.description: Use when deciding how to validate a HuggingFace model id or local model path before/after GenAI changes.

sections.name: enablement
sections.description: Use only when validation shows GenAI support is missing or inaccurate; then choose the smallest relevant skill section.

sections.name: local_build
sections.description: Use after editing OpenVINO GenAI source files to rebuild and validate the edited local package instead of stale installed packages.

sections.name: repository_tests
sections.description: Use after GenAI validation passes to add tiny-random repository tests, run narrow pytest coverage, and update model-specific CI dependencies when required.

sections.name: docs_update
sections.description: Use only after source support and validation pass, when updating supported-model documentation.

sections.name: reporting_rules
sections.description: Use only at the end, to prepare the changed-files summary and required JSON handoff.

allowed_skill_indexes.description: Use only for image-text-to-text VLM enablement details.
Use only when running or interpreting model-checker validation.
Use only after a WWB execution or similarity failure reaches GenAI.
Use only after an llm_bench execution failure reaches GenAI.
Use only when updating supported-model documentation.
